query:
SELECT bl.liverId, l.name as liverName, lp.productName, SUM(lp.gmv) as totalGmv, SUM(lp.itemsSold) as totalSold
FROM brand_livestreams bl
JOIN livestream_products lp ON lp.livestreamId = bl.id
LEFT JOIN livers l ON l.id = bl.liverId
WHERE bl.liverId IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY bl.liverId, l.name, lp.productName
ORDER BY totalGmv DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute SELECT bl.liverId, l.name as liverName, lp.productName, SUM(lp.gmv) as totalGmv, SUM(lp.itemsSold) as totalSold
FROM brand_livestreams bl
JOIN livestream_products lp ON lp.livestreamId = bl.id
LEFT JOIN livers l ON l.id = bl.liverId
WHERE bl.liverId IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY bl.liverId, l.name, lp.productName
ORDER BY totalGmv DESC
LIMIT 20;
